name: Cajun Pork Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the grill to medium heat.
2. In a large bowl, combine water and hot pepper sauce; mix well.
3. Add ground pork and bulk hot sausage to the mixture; gently combine.
4. Shape the mixture into four patties.
5. Place the patties on the gas grill over medium heat.
6. Cook for 14 minutes or until no longer pink, turning once.
7. Serve on buns with lettuce leaves and any desired additions.
